faqs.question: Why are stink bugs so common in Jamaica Estates?
faqs.answer: Jamaica Estates' mature trees, well-maintained gardens, and traditional home construction with multiple entry points make it attractive to stink bugs, especially during fall when they seek shelter indoors. The neighborhood's older homes often have gaps around windows, doors, and siding that stink bugs exploit.

faqs.question: What does your stink bug control service include?
faqs.answer: Our $350–$550 service includes a thorough inspection of entry points, exterior treatment to create a barrier, removal of existing stink bugs, sealing recommendations for gaps and cracks, and follow-up protection to prevent reinfestation throughout the season.

faqs.question: When is stink bug season in Jamaica Estates?
faqs.answer: Stink bugs are most active in Jamaica Estates during fall (September through November) when they seek indoor shelter, and again in spring (March through May) when they emerge. We recommend preventative treatment in early September for best results.

faqs.question: Are your stink bug treatments safe for Jamaica Estates homes and families?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use EPA-approved products that are safe for families, pets, and the environment while remaining highly effective against stink bugs. Our technicians are licensed and trained in application methods appropriate for Jamaica Estates' residential properties.
